Section.Title: Description
Section.Paragraph: The AttachmentType enumeration identifies the kind of framebuffer attachment affected by binding, render pass load/store, clear, resolve, and capture operations.

EnumMemberList.EnumMemberListEntry: Selects a color attachment. Color attachments hold rendered color output from fragment shaders and may have multiple indexed attachments on a framebuffer.
Selects the depth attachment used by depth testing and depth writes.
Selects the stencil attachment used by stencil testing and stencil operations.
